# Acid Leaching

**Summary**: A chemical process used to dissolve carbonate matrix and release microfossils.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-malik|Malik, 2016]] applied acetic acid leaching to extract foraminifera from hard limestone samples.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The method successfully extracted foraminifera from lithified argillaceous limestones, allowing for detailed study of their features. ([[2016-malik|Malik, 2016, p. 50]])
